summary: Horizontal video. A recorded Fox News broadcast segment. It shows a 'FOX NEWS ALERT' with the chyron 'I.C.E. ARRESTS ILLEGAL MEXICAN AFTER TRUMP THREAT', a static shot of detainee Ramon Morales Reyes, then B-roll of Sec. Kristi Noem with on-screen pull-quotes of her statement. It is a re-shared TV news clip with broadcast graphics. On-screen text includes 'FOX NEWS ALERT', 'I.C.E. ARRESTS ILLEGAL MEXICAN AFTER TRUMP THREAT', and 'SEC NOEM ON MIGRANT ARREST OVER TRUMP THREAT'.
notable_text: I.C.E. ARRESTS ILLEGAL MEXICAN AFTER TRUMP THREAT
SEC NOEM ON MIGRANT ARREST OVER TRUMP THREAT
